# Prerelease Gate — 2026-07-21

## Gate checks
| Check | Result | Detail |

| CI / tests (HEAD) | PASS | CI completed/success; go vet + go test -race + go build all green |

| Security | PASS | 0 open critical alerts; govulncheck runs in CI; Dependabot disabled |

## Findings
- [ ] **[WARN][Coverage] No coverage tool configured**
  - **Status quo:** CI runs `go test -race ./...` but no coverage measurement or threshold is configured.
  - **Likely cause:** Coverage was not set up in the initial CI pipeline.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add `go test -coverprofile` and a coverage threshold in a future iteration. Not a release blocker.
  - **Handoff:** `/test-coverage` to set up baseline, then `/02-gh-plan --from-coverage` for any gaps.

- [ ] **[WARN][Distribution] Homebrew token unverifiable via API**
  - **Status quo:** GoReleaser `brews:` references `{{ .Env.HOMEBREW_TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN }}` from `environment: release`. GitHub API requires admin access to list environment secrets — token presence could not be verified programmatically.
  - **Likely cause:** First release; no prior run to validate the token.
  - **Proposed solution:** Verify `HOMEBREW_TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN` exists in GitHub Settings > Environments > release before running `/07-gh-release`. If missing, provision via `symvault get github/personal-access-token --print | gh secret set HOMEBREW_TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN --repo danieljustus/symaira-brain --env release`.
  - **Handoff:** Manual verification in GitHub UI, or `/07-gh-release/references/release-credentials.md` for SymVault resolution.

## Applied mechanical fixes (default mode)
— none — no stale version strings found; all mentions already match v0.1.0. The `version` variable in `cmd/symbrain/main.go` defaults to "dev" and is injected at build time via GoReleaser ldflags.

## Next step
- gate=pass → `/07-gh-release`
